comment.body: I'll offer an explanation, since I've asked like this in the past, but I'm sure you could have guessed it:) At least speaking for me, it's just classic free lunch thinking. Why work myself on reflecting or re-reading your posts, if you have, seemingly, all the answers and can just confirm whatever sentiment or otherwise caused thought comes up:) But always asking for reconfirmation of what you write is a bit like a toxic relationship :DD Can feel right and good in the moment, but 100% not good in the long-term:)
